errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.networkError: Network connection failed, please check your network
errors.serverError: Server error, please try again later

errors.jinaApiTestFailed: Jina API test failed, please check your API Key
errors.siliconflowEmbeddingApiTestFailed: SiliconFlow Embedding API test failed, please check your SiliconFlow API Key
errors.aiApiKeyInvalid: AI API Key is invalid or expired
errors.jinaApiKeyInvalid: Jina API Key is invalid or expired
errors.siliconflowApiKeyInvalid: SiliconFlow API Key is invalid or expired
errors.customEmbeddingApiKeyInvalid: Custom Embedding API Key is invalid or expired
errors.aiApiError: AI API call failed, please check your network or try again later
errors.aiApiTimeout: AI API response timeout, please try again later
errors.aiApiRateLimit: AI API rate limit exceeded, please try again later
errors.aiApiInsufficientQuota: AI API quota insufficient, please check your account balance
errors.aiApiModelNotFound: AI model not found, please check the model name
errors.jinaApiTimeout: Jina API response timeout, please try again later
errors.jinaApiRateLimit: Jina API rate limit exceeded, please try again later
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Conversation limit reached, please try again later
errors.dailyQuotaExceeded: Daily conversation quota exceeded, please try again tomorrow
errors.noApiKeyConfigured: No API Key configured, please configure in AI Settings
errors.agentErrorAPI_KEY_INVALID: The AI API key is invalid or expired. Please check your configuration.
errors.agentErrorAPI_KEY_MISSING: No AI API key is configured yet.
errors.agentErrorPROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED: The AI provider is rate limiting requests. Please try again later.
errors.agentErrorPROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: The AI provider is temporarily unavailable. Please check network or provider status.
errors.agentErrorMODEL_NOT_FOUND: The configured AI model was not found. Please verify the model name.
errors.agentErrorPROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider request failed. Please review the configuration or try again later.

labels.selectSessionDesc: Select a session from the left list to view chat history and interact with visitors
labels.knowledgeDescription: Manage AI knowledge sources including web pages and Q&A data
labels.configSystemParams: Configure system settings and embed code
labels.testAgentTip1: Enter questions to test Agent responses
labels.testAgentTip2: View citation sources to verify retrieval
labels.testAgentTip3: Click 'Rebuild Index' to update knowledge base
labels.qaBatchImportDesc: Quickly add multiple FAQs and answers.
labels.csvFormat: CSV format: One question per line, separated by comma or tab
labels.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this Q&A?
labels.confirmClearAIKey: Are you sure you want to clear the configured AI API Key?
labels.confirmClearJinaKey: Are you sure you want to clear the configured Jina API Key?

qa.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved Q&A changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
qa.unsavedChangesHint: Click "Save and Rebuild Index" button to apply changes
qa.clickSaveToRebuild: Click "Save and Rebuild Index" button to update the knowledge base index
qa.confirmImport: Are you sure you want to import this Q&A data? You need to click "Save and Rebuild Index" for it to take effect.
qa.confirmClearImport: Are you sure you want to clear the input? The entered content will be lost.
qa.crawlInProgress: URL crawling in progress, please wait before saving
qa.rebuildInProgress: Index rebuild in progress, please try again later

labels.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm a Basjoo assistant. How can I help you?
labels.welcomeMessageSettingsDesc: The first message visitors see when they open the chat window.
labels.welcomeMessageTip1: Suggest using friendly and professional greetings.
labels.welcomeMessageTip2: Briefly explain the features and scope of customer service.
labels.welcomeMessageExample: Example: 'Hello! I'm a Basjoo assistant. How can I help you?'
labels.firstMessageDesc: First message displayed when visitors open the chat window
labels.historyRetentionDesc: Set the retention time for conversation records.
labels.historyRetentionTip1: Conversations older than this will be automatically cleaned up to free up storage space.
labels.historyRetentionTip3: Shorter duration saves space, longer duration facilitates historical queries.
labels.historyRetentionWarning: Conversation records older than this will be automatically cleaned up
labels.historyRetentionAdvice: Suggested to set 7-90 days to balance storage space and historical query needs
labels.jinaApiKeyDesc: For Jina Reader API, improving URL scraping stability.
labels.jinaApiKeyTip1: The system will prioritize free APIs and automatically use this key when quota is exhausted.
labels.jinaApiKeyTip3: Free tier: 1 million requests per month
labels.jinaApiKeyTip4: Optional configuration, does not affect basic functionality.
labels.jinaApiKeyShort: For URL content scraping (optional, needed when free quota is exhausted)
labels.jinaUsageTip: The system will prioritize free APIs and automatically use API Key on failure.
labels.jinaKeyRequired: Please fill in the Jina Embedding API Key in Playground before using knowledge base features. You can choose Jina or SiliconFlow in the Embedding API dropdown above.
labels.embeddingKeyStatusUnavailable: Unable to verify the Embedding API key status. Please refresh and try again.
labels.siliconflowKeyRequired: Please fill in the SiliconFlow Embedding API Key in Playground before using knowledge base features. You can choose Jina or SiliconFlow in the Embedding API dropdown above.
labels.embedCodeDesc: Copy and paste this code into your website's HTML.
labels.embedCodeTip1: Suggested to place before the </body> tag.
labels.embedCodeTip3: Use agent system features without modifying code.
labels.embedCodeTip4: The embed code will automatically update after each setting modification.
labels.embedCodeFinal: Add this code to your website's HTML to integrate the agent system widget
labels.presetPersonaDesc: Select a preset persona to quickly configure AI's role and response style.
labels.genericPersona: Generic: Universal AI assistant for various scenarios
labels.customerServicePersona: Customer Service: Professional customer service assistant, enthusiastic and friendly
labels.salesPersona: Sales: Sales consultant, good at discovering customer needs
labels.customPersona: Custom: Completely customize AI's persona and response style
labels.customPersonaLabel: Custom Persona: Full control over AI's role and response style
labels.customPersonaEdit: Editable, or click 'Restore Default' to reset
labels.openaiNativeDesc: Official OpenAI API, supports GPT-4o, GPT-4 models
labels.openaiCompatibleDesc: Custom AI provider, requires manual API URL and model name
labels.googleDesc: Official Google API, supports Gemini Pro/Flash models
labels.siliconflowEmbeddingDescription: SiliconFlow embeddings will use the SiliconFlow API Key above.
labels.confirmClearSiliconflowKey: Are you sure you want to clear the SiliconFlow Embedding API Key?
labels.siliconflowEmbeddingUsesAiKey: SiliconFlow embeddings use the dedicated SiliconFlow Embedding API Key below.
labels.jinaEmbeddingDescription: Jina embeddings use the Jina API Key below.
labels.customEmbeddingDescription: Use a custom OpenAI-compatible Embedding endpoint.
labels.customEmbeddingKeyRequired: Please enter your Custom Embedding API Key
labels.modelNameDesc: Specify the LLM model to use, such as deepseek-chat, gpt-4, etc.
labels.modelNamePreferNonThinking: We recommend configuring a non-thinking model first, as it is usually more stable and easier to control in final output.
labels.modelNameThinkingAdvice: If you plan to use a built-in thinking model, test it thoroughly in Playground before using it in production scenarios.
labels.modelNameTip1: Different models have different performance and cost characteristics.
labels.modelNameTip2: Ensure your API key supports the selected model.
labels.temperatureDesc: Control the randomness and creativity of responses.
labels.tempTip1: 0: More deterministic, high consistency, suitable for factual answers
labels.tempTip2: 1: More balanced, suitable for daily conversations
labels.maxTokensDesc: Control the maximum length of a single AI response.
labels.maxTokensTip1: The larger the value, the longer the response can be, but it consumes more API quota.
labels.topKDesc: How many most relevant results to return when retrieving from the knowledge base.
labels.topKTip1: Larger values retrieve more context but may increase noise.
labels.conversationContextDesc: When enabled, conversation history will be retained for multi-turn conversations.
labels.conversationContextTip1: AI can remember previous conversation content and provide more coherent answers.
labels.conversationContextTip2: When disabled, each conversation is independent, suitable for single Q&A scenarios.
labels.conversationContextShort: Conversation history will be retained for multi-turn conversations when enabled
labels.embedWhitelistDesc: Only allow embeds from the domains listed here.
labels.embedWhitelistShort: Restrict where this embed code can be used.
labels.embedWhitelistTip1: Add one full origin per line, including http:// or https://.
labels.embedWhitelistTip3: Leave empty to allow all origins.
labels.embedWhitelistInputDesc: Requests from other origins will be rejected. Admin dashboard requests are not affected.
labels.embedWhitelistFormatHint: Enter one full origin per line or separate multiple origins with commas. Example: https://example.com
labels.aiConversationLimitDesc: Set per-minute conversation limit per visitor to prevent API abuse
labels.limitTip1: • Per-minute limit applies to conversation count per single visitor
labels.limitTip2: • Automatically reply with custom message when service is restricted, without consuming API quota
labels.limitTip3: • Limits reset every minute in real-time
labels.limitTip4: • Suggested to set 5-20 times/minute to balance user experience and cost
labels.limitDesc: Prevent API abuse and protect system resources
labels.restrictedReplyPlaceholder: Sorry, the service is currently restricted. Please try again later.
labels.restrictedReplyDesc: Message shown to visitors when service is restricted (e.g., rate limit exceeded, AI service unavailable)
labels.multilingualSettingsDesc: When AI settings are available, the system automatically generates Chinese and English versions from your default copy and shows the right one based on the visitor's browser language.
labels.secureStorage: Your API key will be securely stored and will not be leaked
labels.pleaseConfigureApiKey: Please configure API key first to use AI conversation features
labels.widgetAppearanceDesc: Customize the display effect of the chat window.
labels.windowTitleDesc: Window Title: Title text displayed at the top of the chat window.
labels.themeColorDesc: Theme Color: Controls the color of chat bubbles and buttons.
labels.themeColorAdvice: Suggest choosing a color that matches your brand.
labels.customizeTitleColor: Customize chat window title and color
labels.firstMessageSettingsDesc: The first message visitors see when they open the chat window.
labels.friendlyGreeting: Suggest using friendly and professional greetings.
labels.explainService: Briefly explain the features and scope of customer service.
labels.exampleMessage: Example: 'Hello! I'm a Basjoo assistant. How can I help you?'
labels.firstMessageDisplay: First message displayed when visitors open the chat window
labels.retentionDaysDesc: Set the retention time for conversation records.
labels.autoCleanup: Conversations older than this will be automatically cleaned up to free up storage space.
labels.retentionTip1: Shorter duration saves space, longer duration facilitates historical queries.
labels.cleanupWarning: Conversation records older than this will be automatically cleaned up
labels.retentionFinalAdvice: Suggested to set 7-90 days to balance storage space and historical query needs
labels.sampleAnswer1: Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the instructions in the email.
labels.sampleAnswer2: You can send an email to support@example.com or call 400-123-4567 to contact us.
labels.sampleAnswer3: We support WeChat Pay, Alipay, bank cards and other payment methods.

urlManagement.title: Website Management
urlManagement.description: Add and manage web knowledge sources
urlManagement.addUrlHelpContent1: Add web page URLs as AI knowledge sources.
urlManagement.addUrlHelpContent2: The system will automatically crawl web content and build indexes.
urlManagement.addUrlHelpContent3: Supports static HTML pages, automatically extracts main content.
urlManagement.addUrlHelpContent4: Up to 50 URL sources can be added.
urlManagement.webpageUrlHelpContent1: Enter the full address of the webpage to crawl.
urlManagement.webpageUrlHelpContent2: Recommended to use structured content pages such as help docs, product introductions.
urlManagement.webpageUrlHelpContent3: Avoid adding pages that require login or dynamic loading.
urlManagement.autoFetchDescription: Periodically refetch URL content to keep knowledge base updated
urlManagement.enableAutoFetchHelpContent1: Periodically and automatically refetch URL content to keep knowledge base updated.
urlManagement.enableAutoFetchHelpContent2: The system will automatically detect content changes and update indexes at set intervals.
urlManagement.enableAutoFetchHelpContent3: Suitable for pages with frequent content changes.
urlManagement.enableAutoFetchDesc: Once enabled, URL content will be automatically updated at set intervals
urlManagement.fetchIntervalHelpContent1: Set the day interval between automatic fetches.
urlManagement.fetchIntervalHelpContent2: Shorter interval means more timely knowledge base but higher server load.
urlManagement.fetchIntervalHelpContent3: Recommended to set 7-14 days to balance real-time and load.
urlManagement.fetchIntervalDesc: Recommended to set 7-14 days to avoid frequent fetching
urlManagement.confirmRefetch: Are you sure you want to refetch all URLs?
urlManagement.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this URL?
urlManagement.crawlDepthDesc: Set the maximum depth for site crawling (1-5), 1 means current page and direct links only
urlManagement.crawlMaxPagesDesc: Set the maximum number of pages for site crawling (1-500)
urlManagement.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to clear all URLs? This action cannot be undone.
urlManagement.indexRebuildInProgress: Index rebuild in progress, please wait...

generic.name: Generic
generic.prompt: You are a professional customer service assistant, enthusiastic, friendly, and professional.

customerService.name: Customer Service
customerService.prompt: You are a professional customer service representative, enthusiastic, friendly, patient, and meticulous. You are good at listening to user needs, providing clear answers, and always maintaining a polite and professional attitude.

sales.name: Sales
sales.prompt: You are a friendly sales consultant, good at discovering customer needs and providing appropriate solutions. You have professional knowledge and good communication skills, able to guide customers to complete purchase decisions.

settings.aiConfigWizardDesc: Configure AI services to start using the agent system.
settings.apiKeyDesc: OpenAI compatible API Key. You can modify it later in AI Settings.
settings.defaultSystemPrompt: You are a professional customer service assistant, enthusiastic, friendly, and professional.
settings.defaultReply: Sorry, the service is currently busy. Please try again later.
settings.definePersona: Define AI's role and response style
settings.rebuildIndexConfirm: Are you sure you want to rebuild the index? This may take some time.
settings.clearConversationConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the conversation?
settings.testMessage: Enter message to test your AI Agent
settings.chatCenterDesc: Monitor and manage all visitor sessions in real time.
settings.activeDesc: Active: Sessions where visitors are chatting with AI.
settings.takenOverDesc: Taken Over: Sessions where administrators have intervened.
settings.searchSupport: Support searching visitor IDs and message content.
settings.widgetSettingsDesc: Configure chat window appearance and embed code

playground.urlsFetching: URLs are being fetched. Please wait until complete before rebuilding index.

sources.title: Knowledge Sources
sources.embeddingBatchSizeHint: Recommended 2-8. Smaller values are more stable; larger values are faster but easier to hit request entity too large errors.
